name: Linzer Torte#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a 9-inch springform pan.
3. In a bowl, mix together flour, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
4. In a large bowl, beat butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
5. Beat in eggs one at a time, then add lemon juice and vanilla extract.
6. Stir in the flour mixture and chopped almonds.
7. Measure out 2/3 cup batter and spread it evenly over the bottom of the prepared pan.
8. Starting 1/4 inch from the edge of the pan, spread preserves.
9. Drop teaspoons of reserved batter around the edge to make a border.
10. Arrange some sliced almonds in the center and some on the border.
11. Bake for 1 hour.
12. Cool in the pan, then remove. Melt apple jelly and brush over the cake for glaze.
